subject: URGENT! Production system down for over 2 hours, severely impacting business
body:
Hello, this is General Manager Wang from Wantong Logistics.

Our production system has been completely unusable since 10:00 AM today, that's over 2 hours now! All work for our 200+ employees has come to a standstill, logistics dispatch is completely interrupted, and estimated losses exceed 50,000 CNY per hour.

We already submitted ticket TK-1201, but have not received any substantive response so far. Our contract clearly stipulates a 4-hour onsite response SLA. Please immediately arrange a technician to come to our Pudong office for onsite support!

If no technician arrives onsite by 2:00 PM, we will formally file an SLA violation complaint.

Please reply ASAP to confirm dispatch arrangements.

General Manager Wang
Wantong Logistics
Address: Shanghai Pudong New Area, Zhangjiang Hi-Tech Park, xxx Road No. xxx
